title: LEGO Star Wars 75413 Republic Juggernaut - Building Toy with 3 Droid Figures & 5 Minifigures incl. Ki-Adi-Mundi with a Lightsaber - Gift for 9+ Year Old Boys & The Clone Wars Fans
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Buildable Star Wars toy for kids – Tilt and turn into Star Wars: The Clone Wars battle action with this building toy for 9+ year old boys and girls, featuring a detailed LEGO model of a Republic Juggernaut
5 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – Ki-Adi-Mundi with a Lightsaber, Commander Bacara with a blaster and 3 Galactic Marines with blasters, plus 3 LEGO Star Wars Battle Droid figures with blasters
Built for action – Tilt the 10-wheeled vehicle to steer it and place LEGO minifigures in the front and rear opening cockpits, on the elevating observation post and in the turret with a stud shooter
Easy access – Fold down the sides and remove the top of the main compartment to access the detailed interior, which has weapon racks and seats for Commander Bacara and his Galactic Marine troopers
Star Wars gift for kids – This LEGO Star Wars building set makes a great gift for 9+ year old boys, girls and older Star Wars: The Clone Wars fans
A helping hand – Let the LEGO Builder app guide kids on an intuitive building adventure where they can rotate a 3D digital version of their construction models as they build, and more
Building toys for all ages – LEGO Star Wars sets (sold separately) enable kids and adult Star Wars fans to relive classic scenes, create stories or simply display the buildable models
description: From the manufacturer Power into battle Big-action LEGO Star Wars vehicle Build a Republic Juggernaut, as seen in Star Wars: The Clone Wars, and team up with Ki-Adi-Mundi and Commander Bacara against the Battle Droids with this exciting building toy for boys, girls and any fans ages 9 and over. Kids’ birthday gift idea Unlimited action-packed play Kids lead their own heroic battle missions with this impressive 10-wheeler, which has a cool steering system and lots of authentic features to play out exciting Star Wars: The Clone Wars scenes. Previous page Front and rear cockpits Place a Galactic Marine LEGO minifigure in each cockpit. Elevating observation post Seek out Battle Droids from the observation post. Main compartment Remove the top and fold down the sides to access the detailed interior. Tilt to steer To steer this formidable 10-wheeler, tilt it as you move it. Next page Ready for action 5 LEGO Star Wars minifigures and more The set includes Ki-Adi-Mundi with a Lightsaber, Commander Bacara with a blaster and 3 Galactic Marines with blasters, plus 3 Battle Droid LEGO figures with blasters for battle play. Cool LEGO Star Wars gifts for kids Build, play and collect Inspire kids’ imaginations with collectable building sets from the huge LEGO Star Wars assortment (each set sold separately), featuring brick-built models of iconic Star Wars vehicles and legendary characters. Previous page V-19 Torrent Starfighter Team up with General Obi-Wan Kenobi against Asajj Ventress, and swoosh into LEGO Star Wars: The Clone Wars action with an awesome starfighter. Jango Fett’s Starship Join Jango Fett, Young Boba Fett and Lama Su for bounty-hunting adventures in Jango’s stud-shooting, seismic charge-dropping starship. Battle of Felucia Separatist MTT Kids become the heroes in their own epic battle for control of the planet Felucia against Battle Droids deployed from an awesome, brick-built Separatist MTT. Next page
